data.title: Global Connectivity
data.description: WhatsApp is synonymous with global communication, connecting users across continents.

data.title: Privacy-First Approach
data.description: A strong commitment to user privacy with encrypted communication.
data.technical_spec: End-to-end encryption is standard for all forms of communication.

data.title: User-Centric Design
data.description: Focus on creating an intuitive experience tailored to user needs.
data.technical_spec: Constant user feedback loops inform design iterations.

data.title: Reliability and Efficiency
data.description: Prioritizes consistent uptime and performance under varying network conditions.
data.technical_spec: Lightweight app with efficient battery and data usage.

data.title: Ubiquity and Identity
data.description: WhatsApp is often a part of users’ digital identity due to its pervasive global use.
data.technical_spec: Widely adopted in over 180 countries, with over 2 billion users.
